mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.name, a.item_code, a.item_group, a.cycles, a.generate_rule, a.step_type, a.statistics_type, a.step_maxgrade, a.is_step2, a.step2_type, a.step2_maxgrade, a.is_latefee, a.latefee_type, a.latefee_startdate, a.latefee_startdays, a.latefee_formula, a.is_limited, a.limited_type, a.limited_cond, a.limited_times, a.limited_money, a.limited_single_money, a.standard_price, a.money_formula, a.max_money, a.org_id, a.company_id, a.create_time, b.item_name, c.price_formula FROM pr_standard a LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item b ON b.item_code = a.item_code AND b.company_id = a.company_id AND b.org_id = a.org_id LEFT JOIN pr_standard_price c ON c.standard_id = a.id AND c.company_id = a.company_id AND c.org_id = a.org_id AND c.grade = 1 WHERE a.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.item_code = #{type} GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY a.create_time
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pr_standard WHERE item_code = #{itemCode} AND org_id = #{orgId}

SELECT id, name, item_code, item_group, cycles, generate_rule, step_type, statistics_type, step_maxgrade, is_step2, step2_type, step2_maxgrade, is_latefee, latefee_type, latefee_startdate, latefee_startdays, latefee_formula, is_limited, limited_type, limited_cond, limited_times, limited_money, limited_single_money, standard_price, money_formula, max_money, org_id, company_id FROM pr_standard WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, item_code, item_group, cycles, generate_rule, step_type, statistics_type, step_maxgrade, is_step2, step2_type, step2_maxgrade, is_latefee, latefee_type, latefee_startdate, latefee_startdays, latefee_formula, limited_single_money, is_limited, limited_type, limited_cond, limited_times, limited_money, standard_price, money_formula, max_money, org_id, company_id FROM pr_standard WHERE item_code = #{itemCode} AND org_id = #{orgId}

SELECT id, standard_id, step_1_2, grade, minimum, maximum, standard_price, price_formula, other1_price, other2_price, other3_price, max_price, line_mode, line_amount, money_formula, org_id, company_id FROM pr_standard_price WHERE standard_id = #{standardId} AND grade = 1 ORDER BY grade, step_1_2

SELECT id, standard_id, step_1_2, grade, minimum, maximum, standard_price, price_formula, other1_price, other2_price, other3_price, max_price, line_mode, line_amount, money_formula, org_id, company_id FROM pr_standard_price WHERE standard_id = #{standardId} ORDER BY grade

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.item_code, a.item_group, a.cycles, a.generate_rule, a.step_type, a.statistics_type, a.step_maxgrade, a.is_step2, a.step2_type, a.step2_maxgrade, a.is_latefee, a.latefee_type, a.latefee_startdate, a.latefee_startdays, a.latefee_formula, a.is_limited, a.limited_type, a.limited_cond, a.limited_times, a.limited_money, a.limited_single_money, a.standard_price, a.money_formula, a.max_money, a.org_id, a.company_id, a.create_time, b.item_name, c.price_formula FROM pr_standard a LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item b ON b.item_code = a.item_code AND b.company_id = a.company_id AND b.org_id = a.org_id LEFT JOIN pr_standard_price c ON c.standard_id = a.id AND c.company_id = a.company_id AND c.org_id = a.org_id AND c.grade = 1 WHERE a.org_id = #{orgIdCopy} AND b.item_name = #{itemName} GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY a.create_time
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pr_house_expense WHERE standard_id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pr_standard_price(id, standard_id, step_1_2, grade, minimum, maximum, standard_price, price_formula, other1_price, other2_price, other3_price, max_price, start_time, end_time, line_mode, line_amount, money_formula, org_id, company_id, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.standardId}, #{item.step12}, #{item.grade}, #{item.minimum}, #{item.maximum}, #{item.standardPrice}, #{item.priceFormula}, #{item.other1Price}, #{item.other2Price}, #{item.other3Price}, #{item.maxPrice}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.lineMode}, #{item.lineAmount}, #{item.moneyFormula}, #{item.orgId}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.createBy}, NOW())
